histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.DataUploadConfig.DownloadSize
histogram.summary: The size of the downloaded DataUploadConfig in kibibytes. Recorded on a successful download of the config.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.LogSize.OnSuccess
histogram.summary: Size in kilobytes (after compression) of an uploaded Private Metrics log. Recorded after a successful Private Metrics upload.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.LogUpload.Canceled.CellularConstraint
histogram.summary: Logs whether a log was not uploaded due to cellular log throttling logic. Android only.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.LogUpload.ResponseOrErrorCode
histogram.summary: HTTP response codes and network errors encountered by Private Metrics when attempting to upload logs to the server.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PersistentLogRecall.Status
histogram.summary: The status when loading Private Metrics PersistedLogs from Prefs.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.ContextualCueEvents.Logging.QueuedCount
histogram.summary: The number of in-memory queued contextual cue events immediately after logging a new contextual cue event. Logged each time LogContextualCueEvent is called.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.ContextualCueEvents.Logging.RemovedCount
histogram.summary: The number of contextual cue events removed from the queue due to exceeding the maximum configured queue limit. Logged when events are removed during LogContextualCueEvent.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.ContextualCueEvents.Requeuing.DroppedCount
histogram.summary: The number of contextual cue events dropped when attempting to requeue them due to exceeding the maximum configured queue limit. Logged during RequeueEvents.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.ContextualCueEvents.Requeuing.RequeuedCount
histogram.summary: The number of contextual cue events successfully prepended back to the queue after a failed upload attempt. Logged during RequeueEvents.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.ContributedTaskCount
histogram.summary: The number of contributed tasks in a Private Insights federated computation attempt. Logged when federated computation completes.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FcpEvent
histogram.summary: FCP-client-related events, as reported by FCP's event publisher interface. Logged each time the FCP client publishes an event.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FcpHttpClient.BatchSize
histogram.summary: The number of HTTP requests passed in a single batch to the FCP HTTP client PerformRequests call. Logged when PerformRequests is called.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FcpHttpClient.BytesReceived
histogram.summary: The number of bytes received for an FCP HTTP client request. Logged when a request completes.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FcpHttpClient.BytesSent
histogram.summary: The number of bytes sent for an FCP HTTP client request upload. Logged when a request completes.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FcpHttpClient.HttpResponseCode
histogram.summary: The HTTP status code received by the FCP HTTP client for requests. Logged when response headers are received.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FcpHttpClient.NetError
histogram.summary: The net error code for FCP HTTP client requests. Logged when a request completes.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FcpHttpClient.RequestDuration
histogram.summary: The duration of an FCP HTTP client request from creation to completion. Logged when a request completes.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.FederatedComputationOutcome
histogram.summary: The outcome of a Private Insights federated computation attempt. Logged when federated computation completes.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.TriggerUploadOutcome
histogram.summary: The outcome of a Private Insights trigger upload attempt. Logged each time TriggerUpload is called.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.Upload.PendingTime
histogram.summary: The time between when TriggerUpload was called and when UploadBlocking started running on the background thread. Logged when UploadBlocking starts.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PrivateInsights.Upload.Time
histogram.summary: The time spent running UploadBlocking on the background thread. Logged when UploadBlocking finishes.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.ProtoCompressionRatio
histogram.summary: Compression ratio of the serialized protobuf that will be uploaded to the Private Metrics server. This serialized protobuf is compressed using gzip.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PUMA.LogRotationOutcome
histogram.summary: The outcome of a PUMA log rotation. Logged for each triggered rotation.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PUMA.ReportBuildingOutcome.Rc
histogram.summary: The outcome of building a report for PUMA for Regional Capabilities. Logged for each triggered report build.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.PUMA.ReportStoringOutcome.Rc
histogram.summary: The outcome of storing a report for PUMA for Regional Capabilities. Logged for each triggered report store request.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.UnsentLogs.DroppedSize
histogram.summary: Number of bytes in an excessively large log that was discarded while persisting Private Metrics logs to disk to retry during next chrome run.

histogram.name: PrivateMetrics.UnsentLogs.NumDropped
histogram.summary: Counter for number of Private Metrics unsent logs removed from persistent storage.
